case_title: RICHARD B FULLERTON VS. AUTOMATIC GARAGE DOOR CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FULLERTON, RICHARD B AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOMATIC GARAGE DOOR CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF RICHARD B. FULLERTON OR DEFENDANT AUTOMATIC GARAGE DOOR CORP. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH MEYERS. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
